hero.title: Software Engineering Student & Backend Developer | System Architecture & Quality Assurance
hero.description: Software Engineering student at Veracruz University specializing in system architecture and clean code. I design and build scalable, well-documented applications by applying rigorous engineering standards from requirements elicitation to deployment.

about.p1: My journey in technology and art are not separate worlds for me — both require patience, aesthetic judgment, and the will to iterate until arriving at something that feels right.
about.p2: When I am not programming, I enjoy drawing and building worlds that allow me to explore realms that code still cannot fully imitate.

layla.name: layla
layla.desc: A comprehensive social network platform dedicated to writers. Architected with polyglot persistence to handle complex relationships and high-performance querying, integrating advanced search capabilities and cross-platform accessibility.

memory_game.name: Memory Game
memory_game.desc: A full-stack, distributed memory game featuring a real-time multiplayer architecture, global chat system, and concurrent state management.

ppms.name: Professional Practices Management System
ppms.desc: An enterprise-level desktop application designed to streamline and manage university professional practices, focusing on robust data validation and intuitive user experience.

pinterest.name: Pinterest Board Downloader
pinterest.desc: An automated web scraping tool built to efficiently extract and download image datasets from Pinterest, utilizing headless browser automation.

art.intro: A parallel practice to development, but equally serious. I craft my works with patience and love. Sometimes I draw in digital too :3

contact.desc: I am available for freelance projects, collaborations, and full-time opportunities. If you have something interesting in mind, drop me a message.
